title: Dragon Ball Super
desc: After defeating Majin Buu, Goku returns to his life as a radish farmer. However, he soon finds himself on a new quest after the rise of Beerus, a powerful being who wants to kill him.

title: Courage the Cowardly Dog
desc: Courage, a timid pink dog with paranoia problems, defends his elderly owners from ghosts and paranormal activity on their farm.

title: Hunter X Hunter
desc: Gon Freecss sets out to become a Hunter, an elite professional known for hunting rare monsters and treasures, in the hopes of finding his absent father.

title: One Piece
desc: Monkey D Luffy, a young man made of rubber, and his team of pirates embark on an exciting adventure to find a fabled treasure.

title: Kiteretsu
desc: Kiteretsu, an elementary school student who uses his inventions to help people, and Korosuke, his robot, partake in various adventures along with his friends.

title: We Bare Bears
desc: Three brother bears, Grizzly, Panda, and Ice, awkwardly navigate life in the San Francisco Bay Area as they try to fit into modern human society.

title: Lamput
desc: A clever orange nutcase, Lamput, escapes from a hidden laboratory, thus sending scientists Slim Doc and Fat Doc in a frenzy as they try hard to capture him. However, Lamput always manages to escape.
